pages.raw_text:
A company of men arrived in Spo-
kane, this morning over the North
ern Pacific from the west and at once
left over the Spokane Falls & North
erni for Kettle Falls. 1t was learned
that they were men interested in the
project of the Northwestern Irriga-
ton, Power & Investment company,
which has secured rights for the de-
of a large tract of land to
be opened shortly for improvement,
and which will be tributary to spo-
kane.


Details of the scheme were not
willingly given out by the party, but
The Press learned that the company
intends to build ditch from the Col
vile river which will furnish water
for $4,000 acres lying between the
Colviile and Columbia rivers and in
clude Kettle Falls and Daisy.


1t is also intimated that the men
